description: A backup generator is reporting its status to Emoncms (1 = Running, 0 = Stopped) on the input 'generator_status'. Configure an input processing chain to track the total running hours of the generator, ensuring that one hour of 'Running' status results in a cumulative increment of 1.0. Log the result to a new feed named 'generator_hours' (Tag: 'generator', Engine: PHPFina, Interval: 10s).
